name: Dungeons & Dragons 5e
author: CDubs00
description: Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition (2014 rules). Single dense character page styled after the classic sheet — ability rail, saving throws & skills, a condensed combat block with shields/HP/death-saves/exhaustion, an octagon spell-slot rail, weapons over spells, and money above equipment. Background (with features, magic items & allies) and a session log live on their own tabs. ⓘ reference pop-overs throughout; auto-fitting combat values.
